discussion_comments.comment_body:
Awesome for adding a demo!

Can you also add this demo (or another diagram) to the [`cypress/integration/rendering/flowchart-v2.spec.js`](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/blob/d6e738ac4cf2e208326b0ca3a8702d940cb846ec/cypress/integration/rendering/flowchart-v2.spec.js) file? This is just so we get some automated screenshots of the new feature you added :)

It should look something like:

```ts
  it('Should render subgraphs with different nodeSpacing', () => {
    imgSnapshotTest(`---
title: Subgraph nodeSpacing and rankSpacing example
---
flowchart LR
  X --> Y
  subgraph X
    direction LR
    A
    C
  end
  subgraph Y
    direction LR
    B
    D
  end
`,
      { flowchart: { nodeSpacing: 1, rankSpacing: 1 } }
    );
  });
```

discussion_comments.comment_body:
Let's add the new yaml config option to the test. ```suggestion 
      %%{init:{"theme":"base", "themeVariables": {"lineColor":"red"}}}%%
      flowchart LR
      subgraph red
      A --> B
      end
    
      %%{init:{"theme":"base", "themeVariables": {"lineColor":"blue"}}}%%
      flowchart LR
      subgraph black
      A --> B
      end
    
      ---
      config:
        theme: base
        themeVariables:
          lineColor: yellow
      ---
      flowchart LR
      subgraph red
      A --> B
      end
    
      ---
      config:
        theme: base
        themeVariables:
          lineColor: green
      ---
      flowchart LR
      subgraph black
      A --> B
      end
```
